'''Menugg''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a successful [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. He was eventually persuaded to leave the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] by a group of off-worlders and began working as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He later became affiliated with the criminal group known as [[Vurrha's Blood]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], serving as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] for its leader, [[Vurrha Chur]]. Menugg was a master of conflict, specializing in melee combat and growing bored when he was not fighting.

==Biography==
The [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Menugg was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]], where he became a highly successful [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], with numerous victories to his name and great success with female companions. His skill eventually attracted the attention of a group of off-worlders, who traveled across Gamorr to [[Menugg's village]] and persuaded Menugg to leave his home by showing him items and images from the outside [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. After leaving his home [[City/Legends|village]], Menugg initially worked for those who had convinced him to leave Gamorr and soon made a name for himself as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].<ref name="UA" />

He eventually joined the criminal group known as [[Vurrha's Blood]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] after its leader, the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Vurrha Chur]], was nearly [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]]. Menugg then served loyally as the Quarren's [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] for at least several [[Standard year/Legends|years]], traveling everywhere with him, a job for which he was very well paid. Chur was the only other member of the organization who spoke [[Gamorrese|Gamorrean]], so he let Menugg know what was happening on occasion. Menugg planned to one [[Standard day/Legends|day]] use his riches to retire to Gamorr and build a large home for he and a family to live in.<ref name="UA" />

==Personality and traits==
Menugg had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin, yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and black [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. He stood 1.9 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall while he served with Vurrha's Blood and, by that [[Time/Legends|time]], was extremely muscular, with permanently [[Blood/Legends|bloodshot]] eyes due to the number of blows he had taken to the head during his career. Even while still on Gamorr, Menugg lived for conflict, with melee combat being the type of fighting he found the most enjoyable. Long periods without violence, especially if others were talking, would bore the Gamorrean, although he was disciplined enough to endure it. On Gamorr, he was successful with Gamorrean sows and was pleased with his life. However, the lure of trinkets and images of other planets eventually persuaded him to leave his home, a decision that he never regretted. Menugg was extremely loyal to Chur due to the high wages the Quarren paid him, although his allegiance could be swayed by a persuasive competitor willing to pay more.<ref name="UA" />

==Skills and abilities==
While fighting on Gamorr, Menugg became a master of warfare, being capable in melee combat and proficient with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. He was able to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and knew how to use [[Armor/Legends|armor]] effectively. The only [[Language/Legends|language]] that Menugg spoke and understood was Gamorrean.<ref name="UA" />

==Equipment==
Menugg always wore [[Padded armor/Legends|padded armor]] and carried a [[thogk]] and a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]]. He also wore a [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]] and carried a stash of 800 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in his left [[Boot/Legends|boot]].<ref name="UA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Menugg first appeared in ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'', a book released in [[2004]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]] as a supplement to the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. In the book, Menugg's portrait was illustrated by [[Daniel Falconer]], and the character is one of a large number of possible adversaries provided for use in the [[Roleplaying game|game]]. He is usable in any of the three eras of play that were available at the time of the book's release, the [[Rise of the Empire era]], the [[Rebellion era]], and the [[New Republic era]]. As such, this article makes no assumptions as to what time frame Menugg was active during, although the book suggests that if the Gamorrean is being used during the Rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] era or the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era, he could be working as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] for a [[Noble/Legends|noble]] or [[Politics/Legends|politician]]. Although it is not clear when Menugg was active,<ref name="UA" /> the entry for [[Ereen Agar]], another member of Vurrha's Blood, in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' establishes that Vurrha Chur operated during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|14|Agar, Ereen}}</ref>
